mapper.select: SELECT attendance_date, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_status = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_count, SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_status = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_count, SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_status = 'EARLY_LEAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS early_leave_count, SUM(CASE WHEN attendance_status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS absent_count FROM attendance_record WHERE attendance_date >= #{startDate} AND attendance_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY attendance_date ORDER BY attendance_date
